hero.title: for banks
hero.subtitle: Turn every WhatsApp conversation into a payment channel. Your brand, your rails, your customers.
hero.description: Embed one-tap payments inside your banking app — iOS, Android & React Native SDK.

contact.title: See what your customers would experience
contact.subtitle: Schedule a personalized demo and see Magic running inside a banking app — live.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.submitErrorRetry: Error sending the form. Please try again.

success.title: Thank you, {name}!
success.message: Your demo request has been received. Our team will reach out to you within 24 hours to schedule your personalized demonstration.

payWithoutLeavingChat.title: Chat-native payments for your customers
payWithoutLeavingChat.description: Your customers activate a branded payment keyboard inside WhatsApp, Instagram, Telegram, or Messages — and send payment links without leaving the conversation. Your bank stays front and center.
payWithoutLeavingChat.descriptionPart2: inside WhatsApp, Instagram, Telegram, or Messages — and send payment links without leaving the conversation. Your bank stays front and center.

tapToSend.title: Tap & QR — in-person transfers, zero friction
tapToSend.description: Your customers generate NFC or QR payment links from your app. No account details exchanged. Transfers settle on your existing rails.

instantClaim.title: One-click claim for recipients
instantClaim.description: Anyone who receives a payment link enters their details once. Every claim after that is a single tap. Fewer errors, fewer support calls, faster settlement.

brandCustomizable.title: Fully white-label
brandCustomizable.description: Your colors, your logo, your trust signals. The SDK adapts to your bank's brand while keeping Magic's proven UX patterns. Available for iOS, Android, and React Native.

localRails.title: Local rails, global reach
localRails.description: Settles via the fastest local rail — SPEI, SEPA Instant, Pix, Faster Payments, UPI, Bizum, Blik, and more. Magic orchestrates the experience; your bank executes the transfer. No fund custody, no new compliance burden.

trustLine.title: Your security, your compliance
trustLine.description: Magic runs inside your infrastructure. KYC/AML, transaction monitoring, and risk limits stay entirely in your hands. Every link is unique, tokenized, and time-limited.

subheader.headline: Create a payment link → share it anywhere → recipient claims in seconds.

integrations.title: Local rails, global reach
integrations.description: Settles via the fastest local rail — SPEI, SEPA Instant, Pix, Faster Payments, UPI, Bizum, Blik, and more. Magic orchestrates the experience; your bank executes the transfer.

footer.legalText: This site complies with the Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties (LFPDPPP) of Mexico.
